company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that helps YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok creators automate their video editing workflow using AI — from auto-cuts and transitions to AI-generated captions.

policies.details: No refunds are provided after 7 days of purchase. Refunds can be requested within the first 7 days by contacting support.
24/7 support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support with a 24-hour response time.
You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the current billing cycle.
A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports export for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and any custom resolution.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can switch plans at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: There is no permanent free plan, but we offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan.
